description: The Comberiati are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Petilia Policastro, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Coco-Trovato clan and have controlled neighborhoods in Milan, particularly Quarto Oggiaro. The clan has been involved in multiple murders, including the 2009 killing of witness Lea Garofalo. Key members include boss Vincenzo Comberiati, arrested and sentenced to 41-bis solitary confinement.
